texto: Regret is a commonality that all humans share, I myself have many. Through out my life I have made many mistakes some little and some infinite. There are those you can change and those that change you. Regardless, its all really just woulda, shoulda, coulda. We do the best we can and mistakes are only lessons in disguise. I will flow through this life like water until I reach the sea of contentment and then all will be well......
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a J.S. Riley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Regret is a commonality that all humans share, I myself have many. Through out my life I have mad…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, regrets, through pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e reflexao.

texto: The wisdom of my 45 years has met and joined simplicity and it has drawn a long and merry smile:)
explicacao: Citação de J.S. Riley sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The wisdom of my 45 years has met and joined simplicity and it has drawn a long and merry smile:)” articula reflexao, age, wisdom em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Beauty for wisdom, lust for love, youth for happiness, anger for understanding and denial for acceptance are all things I gladly trade on my journey through life. Who say's getting old is a bad thing?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de J.S. Riley que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Beauty for wisdom, lust for love, youth for happiness, anger for understanding and denial for acc…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, age, beauty, com foco em viagem e reflexao.

texto: Reality is funny, Your's will always be different than mine. This turns the truth into an illusion. They say everyone lies so what do we do? We believe in ourselves! You are the only real....
